strengths: The agent maintained a somewhat professional tone throughout the call, which is a positive aspect of their communication skills.
The agent was able to identify the issue as a contactless payment problem, which shows they were paying attention to the customer's concern.
The agent offered to have the customer come into a branch for further assistance, which demonstrates a willingness to help the customer.
improvements: The agent needs to verify the customer's card details before proceeding with troubleshooting, as per policy.
The agent should walk the customer through basic troubleshooting steps before suggesting a visit to a branch.
The agent must check if the customer's card has been blocked or suspended and escalate the issue to a specialist if necessary.

rephrasing.original: I'm not sure if your card is blocked, but you can come into a branch and we'll take a look.
rephrasing.better: I'd like to check if your card has been blocked or suspended. Can you please confirm your card number and expiration date so I can look into this further? If it has been blocked, I can assist you with unblocking it or escalate the issue to a specialist if needed.

rephrasing.original: Have you tried turning your contactless payment off and on again? If that doesn't work, you can come into a branch and we'll help you troubleshoot further.
rephrasing.better: Let's go through some basic troubleshooting steps together. Can you please try turning your contactless payment off and on again? If that doesn't resolve the issue, I can guide you through some additional steps or offer alternative solutions. If we're unable to resolve the issue, I can also offer to have you come into a branch for further assistance.

rephrasing.original: I'm not able to see if your card is blocked, but I can offer to have you come into a branch and we'll take a look.
rephrasing.better: I'd like to check if your card has been blocked or suspended. Can you please confirm your card number and expiration date so I can look into this further? If it has been blocked, I can assist you with unblocking it or escalate the issue to a specialist if needed. If not, I can guide you through some additional troubleshooting steps or offer alternative solutions.
